text.text: {{ $json.statusCode >= 500 ? '🚨 CRITICAL' : $json.statusCode === 0 ? '💀 UNREACHABLE' : '⚠️ WARNING' }} — Link Monitor Alert

meta.description: Every hour, checks a configurable list of URLs via HTTP GET, evaluates status codes and response times, alerts Slack for broken/slow links, and logs every check result to Google Sheets for trending.
prerequisites: Slack Bot Token with chat:write scope
Update the URL list in Code node with your actual URLs
Enable continueOnFail on HTTP node (already set) to handle timeouts gracefully

testingScenario.happy_path: All URLs return 200 → no Slack alert, all logged
testingScenario.test_broken_link: Add 'https://httpstat.us/404' to URL list → should trigger Slack alert
edge_cases: Redirect chains → followed up to 5 redirects
SSL cert error → error message captured, shows as broken
Rate limited (429) → shows as 429 warning, not critical
Same URL alerting every hour → add dedup logic or Slack throttling
